name: Musang King
tasteProfile: Rich, creamy, bittersweet with deep caramel notes
ripenessTips: Stem should be slightly dry; flesh yields gently when pressed; strong sweet aroma

name: Black Thorn
tasteProfile: Intensely sweet with subtle alcoholic undertone and smoky finish
ripenessTips: Check the thorn at the base; should be dark and firm; strong fruity fragrance

name: Red Prawn
tasteProfile: Sweet and mildly bitter with floral honey notes
ripenessTips: Husk should feel hollow when shaken; flesh is deeply coloured and aromatic

name: XO
tasteProfile: Bitter-sweet with a distinctive fermented, alcoholic aftertaste
texture: Watery, soft, almost pudding-like when fully ripe
ripenessTips: Strong fermented wine-like smell; husk is slightly browned at stem

name: D24
tasteProfile: Balanced sweetness with mild bitterness and nutty undertones
ripenessTips: Thorns should be close together; sweet earthy aroma; flesh is firm yet yielding

name: Monthong
tasteProfile: Mildly sweet, milky, with vanilla undertones
ripenessTips: Stem is thick and woody; light pleasant aroma; flesh should spring back when pressed

name: Chanee
tasteProfile: Rich sweetness with nutty and slightly bitter aftertaste
ripenessTips: Strong pungent aroma; flesh is soft and deeply coloured; husk is brownish-green

name: Kradum
tasteProfile: Sweet and floral with a clean finish
ripenessTips: Small round shape with blunt thorns; gentle sweet smell; flesh dents slightly when pressed

name: Raja Kunyit
tasteProfile: Very sweet with turmeric-like earthiness and caramel notes
ripenessTips: Star-shaped pattern at base; strong aroma; flesh is intensely yellow

name: Bawor
tasteProfile: Mild sweetness with a savoury, almost cheesy note
ripenessTips: Husk is pale green to brown; mild aroma; flesh yields easily to touch

name: Petruk
tasteProfile: Sweet and slightly sour with fruity undertones
ripenessTips: Medium-sized oval shape; reddish tinge on husk; pleasant fruity aroma

name: Duri Hitam
tasteProfile: Complex sweetness with wine-like depth and smoky aroma
ripenessTips: Base thorn is dark brown to black; alcoholic aroma when ripe; flesh is deeply coloured

name: D101
tasteProfile: Sweet with subtle grassy and herbal notes
ripenessTips: Greenish husk even when ripe; mild sweet scent; flesh is tender

name: D13
tasteProfile: Sweet, nutty, with hints of peanut butter
ripenessTips: Flat base and round shape; strong nutty aroma; flesh is bright orange

name: D88
tasteProfile: Creamy sweetness with vanilla and almond undertones
ripenessTips: Thorns are thick and stubby; rich buttery aroma; flesh is glossy yellow

name: Tekka
tasteProfile: Floral sweetness with a light, tea-like fragrance
ripenessTips: Long oval shape; delicate floral smell; flesh is pale and firm when ripe

name: Hor Lor
tasteProfile: Bitter-sweet with complex layers and a dry finish
ripenessTips: Gourd-like shape; bitter almond smell; flesh is pale and firm

name: Ang Heh
tasteProfile: Intensely sweet with a hint of rose and syrup
texture: Very soft, almost liquid when fully ripe
ripenessTips: Small size with dense thorns; syrupy sweet aroma; flesh is deeply red-orange

name: Green Bamboo
tasteProfile: Mild sweetness with fresh, vegetal notes
ripenessTips: Greenish husk persists when ripe; light fresh aroma; flesh is springy to touch

name: Johor Hybrid
tasteProfile: Balanced sweet-bitter with buttery richness
ripenessTips: Uniform shape; strong sweet aroma; flesh yields gently with slight bounce
